title: WorkerResult
description: Typed result a clipse-worker subprocess writes to stdout after each turn. The dispatcher is the only consumer; it drives every board transition off this contract. See board.schema.json for the canonical Lane/BlockKind enums this schema references.

issue_id.description: Linear issue identifier this run is working.

outcome.description: Terminal state of this worker turn, interpreted by the dispatcher's state machine.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what happened this turn.

artifacts.description: Paths or references produced this turn (files touched, logs, etc).

pr_url.description: URL of the PR opened/updated this turn, if any. Optional.

handoff.description: Structured handoff note for the issue's Linear thread: decisions, interfaces, deviations, gotchas for dependents. Optional; present only when the lane produced one.

thread_id.description: LangGraph checkpointer thread id, for resuming continuation turns.

turn_count.description: Number of turns run so far for this issue, including this one.
